markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[To explain the GrowthX content pipeline and its core components.](https://fathom.video/share/_4Vd8fzriikAin3d1ysUFao5skCPLJHR?tab=summary&timestamp=1181.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Core Pipeline:** The standard pipeline drafts a research-based article, then applies client-specific style and product details in a separate validation step. This two-step process prevents the AI from creating well-written but disconnected sections.](https://fathom.video/share/_4Vd8fzriikAin3d1ysUFao5skCPLJHR?tab=summary&timestamp=1824.0)
  - [**Pipeline Customization:** Pipelines are built by copying a proven template (e.g., Hex) and customizing its YAML code. Claude is a key tool for debugging and optimizing this code.](https://fathom.video/share/_4Vd8fzriikAin3d1ysUFao5skCPLJHR?tab=summary&timestamp=1415.0)
  - [**Content Refreshes:** The automated refresh pipeline is unreliable, often requiring manual work. This is a significant gap, as refreshes can yield faster, higher-impact SEO wins than net-new content.](https://fathom.video/share/_4Vd8fzriikAin3d1ysUFao5skCPLJHR?tab=summary&timestamp=2291.0)
  - [**PSEO as a Special Project:** Programmatic SEO (PSEO) is not a standard Sprint offering due to its complexity and calibration time. However, the engineering team can build robust, end-to-end PSEO systems as special projects.](https://fathom.video/share/_4Vd8fzriikAin3d1ysUFao5skCPLJHR?tab=summary&timestamp=2634.0)

## Topics

### Pipeline Architecture: Studio vs. Atlas

  - [The system has two main components:](https://fathom.video/share/_4Vd8fzriikAin3d1ysUFao5skCPLJHR?tab=summary&timestamp=1442.0)
      - [**Studio:** The engineering backend where core workflows (functions) are programmed in YAML.](https://fathom.video/share/_4Vd8fzriikAin3d1ysUFao5skCPLJHR?tab=summary&timestamp=1353.0)
      - [**Atlas:** The user-facing UI where MEs assemble and run pipelines by pulling functions from Studio.](https://fathom.video/share/_4Vd8fzriikAin3d1ysUFao5skCPLJHR?tab=summary&timestamp=1442.0)
  - [**Analogy:** Studio is the library of building blocks, and Atlas is the workspace where MEs combine them into a pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/_4Vd8fzriikAin3d1ysUFao5skCPLJHR?tab=summary&timestamp=1442.0)
  - [**Standard Build Process:** MEs copy a proven pipeline template (e.g., Hex) into a new client workspace and then customize its YAML code.](https://fathom.video/share/_4Vd8fzriikAin3d1ysUFao5skCPLJHR?tab=summary&timestamp=1415.0)

### Standard Pipeline Workflow (Hex Example)

  - [The pipeline is a sequence of steps designed to produce a high-quality, client-specific article.](https://fathom.video/share/_4Vd8fzriikAin3d1ysUFao5skCPLJHR?tab=summary&timestamp=1571.0)
  - [**1. Input:** ME defines the assignment (topic, keywords, etc.).](https://fathom.video/share/_4Vd8fzriikAin3d1ysUFao5skCPLJHR?tab=summary&timestamp=1582.0)
  - [**2. Research Topic:** An AI agent (e.g., Tavily, Exa) gathers information, avoiding specified competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/_4Vd8fzriikAin3d1ysUFao5skCPLJHR?tab=summary&timestamp=1955.0)
  - [**3. Draft Article:** An LLM (e.g., Opus) writes a research-based draft.](https://fathom.video/share/_4Vd8fzriikAin3d1ysUFao5skCPLJHR?tab=summary&timestamp=2049.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This step focuses on structure and flow. Applying the full style guide here would result in disconnected sections, as the AI validates each chunk in isolation.](https://fathom.video/share/_4Vd8fzriikAin3d1ysUFao5skCPLJHR?tab=summary&timestamp=1824.0)
      - [**Artifacts:** The drafter receives artifacts like the audience persona and product info to ensure foundational accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/_4Vd8fzriikAin3d1ysUFao5skCPLJHR?tab=summary&timestamp=2068.0)
  - [**4. Validate Writing Style Guide:** The article is rewritten to match the client's voice and incorporate product messaging.](https://fathom.video/share/_4Vd8fzriikAin3d1ysUFao5skCPLJHR?tab=summary&timestamp=1607.0)
  - [**5. Add Internal Links:** Scrapes the client's sitemap to find relevant internal links.](https://fathom.video/share/_4Vd8fzriikAin3d1ysUFao5skCPLJHR?tab=summary&timestamp=1631.0)
  - [**6. Add Source Links:** Identifies claims and adds external sources from the research step.](https://fathom.video/share/_4Vd8fzriikAin3d1ysUFao5skCPLJHR?tab=summary&timestamp=1651.0)
      - [**Known Issue:** This step is imperfect; it can add irrelevant links or miss existing sources.](https://fathom.video/share/_4Vd8fzriikAin3d1ysUFao5skCPLJHR?tab=summary&timestamp=1651.0)
  - [**7. Final Proofread Checklist:** A final validation step for grammar and specific word choices.](https://fathom.video/share/_4Vd8fzriikAin3d1ysUFao5skCPLJHR?tab=summary&timestamp=1714.0)
  - [**8. Meta Tags & Header Image:** Generates metadata and prepares for image integration.](https://fathom.video/share/_4Vd8fzriikAin3d1ysUFao5skCPLJHR?tab=summary&timestamp=1749.0)

### Pipeline Customization & Debugging

  - [Pipeline customization is done by editing the YAML code in Atlas.](https://fathom.video/share/_4Vd8fzriikAin3d1ysUFao5skCPLJHR?tab=summary&timestamp=1909.0)
  - [**Key Customization Points:**](https://fathom.video/share/_4Vd8fzriikAin3d1ysUFao5skCPLJHR?tab=summary&timestamp=1909.0)
      - [**Research:** Specify tools (Exa for technical topics, Tavily for speed) and add competitor exclusions.](https://fathom.video/share/_4Vd8fzriikAin3d1ysUFao5skCPLJHR?tab=summary&timestamp=1955.0)
      - [**Drafter:** Select the LLM (e.g., Opus 4.5) and provide instructions to pull specific artifacts (e.g., customer stories).](https://fathom.video/share/_4Vd8fzriikAin3d1ysUFao5skCPLJHR?tab=summary&timestamp=2049.0)
  - [**Debugging with Claude:** Paste the pipeline's YAML code into Claude to ask why a specific result is occurring or to generate a new step.](https://fathom.video/share/_4Vd8fzriikAin3d1ysUFao5skCPLJHR?tab=summary&timestamp=2236.0)
  - [**Artifact Management:**](https://fathom.video/share/_4Vd8fzriikAin3d1ysUFao5skCPLJHR?tab=summary&timestamp=2814.0)
      - [Long or conflicting artifacts (e.g., a style guide that contradicts a "good example") can cause the pipeline to fail or run for 30–45 minutes as it hits its `max_iterations` limit.](https://fathom.video/share/_4Vd8fzriikAin3d1ysUFao5skCPLJHR?tab=summary&timestamp=2965.0)
      - [Strict client rules (e.g., NetRisk's "AI-isms" prompt) require a dedicated validation step to ensure adherence.](https://fathom.video/share/_4Vd8fzriikAin3d1ysUFao5skCPLJHR?tab=summary&timestamp=2814.0)

### Article Refreshes & PSEO

  - [**Article Refreshes:**](https://fathom.video/share/_4Vd8fzriikAin3d1ysUFao5skCPLJHR?tab=summary&timestamp=2291.0)
      - [The automated refresh pipeline is unreliable, often requiring manual work.](https://fathom.video/share/_4Vd8fzriikAin3d1ysUFao5skCPLJHR?tab=summary&timestamp=2330.0)
      - [**Rationale:** It struggles with poor website structure and may add unverified information.](https://fathom.video/share/_4Vd8fzriikAin3d1ysUFao5skCPLJHR?tab=summary&timestamp=2330.0)
      - [**Significance:** This is a major gap, as refreshes can deliver faster, higher-impact SEO wins for clients with large content libraries.](https://fathom.video/share/_4Vd8fzriikAin3d1ysUFao5skCPLJHR?tab=summary&timestamp=2517.0)
  - [**Programmatic SEO (PSEO):**](https://fathom.video/share/_4Vd8fzriikAin3d1ysUFao5skCPLJHR?tab=summary&timestamp=2634.0)
      - [Not a standard offering for Strategy Sprints due to its complexity and calibration time.](https://fathom.video/share/_4Vd8fzriikAin3d1ysUFao5skCPLJHR?tab=summary&timestamp=2634.0)
      - [**Capability:** The engineering team can build robust, end-to-end PSEO systems as special projects (e.g., SentinelOne's CVE pages, Webflow's integration guides).](https://fathom.video/share/_4Vd8fzriikAin3d1ysUFao5skCPLJHR?tab=summary&timestamp=2634.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**William:** Review Kirkland's pipeline audit documents for Hex, Redis, and ReadAI to understand common issues and optimizations.](https://fathom.video/share/_4Vd8fzriikAin3d1ysUFao5skCPLJHR?tab=summary&timestamp=3188.0)
  - [**Kathy:** Add NetRisk's strict "AI-isms" prompt to the client's writing style guide artifact.](https://fathom.video/share/_4Vd8fzriikAin3d1ysUFao5skCPLJHR?tab=summary&timestamp=2814.0)
  - [**Sydney:** Share Panzer's Claude project guidelines for pipeline optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/_4Vd8fzriikAin3d1ysUFao5skCPLJHR?tab=summary&timestamp=2267.0)
